beatmaps.title: Shinbatsu o Tadori Kyoukotsu ni Itaru
beatmaps.title_unicode: 神罰を辿り狂骨に至る
beatmaps.creator: Daletto
beatmaps.tags: arthro -rustyy rustyy ririmu mochi_- mochi -hex- hex stardust prism stardust_prism catch indonesia cup open 2025 cico2025 gf grandfinals grand finals hr1 hardrock1 japanese rock featured artist fa リブユウキ rib yuhki hull kim kimi hellnear 飯塚悠人 yuto iizuka shuhei kamada icdd 黄泉より聴こゆ、皇国の燈と焔の少女。 yomi yori kikoyu koukoku no tou to honoo no shoujo. symphonic black metal dojin doujin 殯――死へ耽る想いは戮辱すら喰らい、彼方の生を愛する為に命を讃える――。shi e fukeru omoi wa rikujoku sura kurai kanata no sei wo aisuru tame ni inoti wo tataeru. mogari
